reason: Backend spec entrypoint and quality checklist for verification.
Coverage, mock boundaries, and anti-tautological-test rules for reviewing added tests.
Verify failure branches expose useful errors and do not silently swallow critical paths.
Verify new logging/error handling follows backend conventions without leaking secrets.
Verify MCP scanner and symbol contracts remain aligned after mcp_server fixes.
Verify implementation stays within signal/MCP boundary and does not add out-of-scope execution behavior.
